Our Niche & Territory

We Only Serve
Kumaon Hospitality.

Our territory spans 8 key destinations across Kumaon. We work exclusively with local hospitality brands, providing deep regional expertise that generic outside agencies can't match.

🏔️

Heritage

Hotels & havelis

🌿

Nature Retreats

Eco-lodges & camps

🏡

Homestays

B&Bs & guest houses

☕

Cafés

Dining & local food

NainitalMukteshwarJim CorbettRanikhetAlmoraBinsarBhimtalKausani
White rice-paste patterns on terracotta
Aipan Folk Art

Kumaon’s Sacred Living Art Form.

Aipan is a centuries-old folk art from Kumaon — patterns drawn with red clay and white rice paste. Each motif is sacred. At Shikhar Media, it’s our philosophy: every campaign we craft is intentional and deeply local.

What We Do

360° Marketing
Under One Roof.

Strategy. Execution. AI. Everything — so you focus on running your property.

01

Social Media

  • Content creation
  • Founder profile
  • Reels & stories
  • Community management
02

Website Design

  • Brand identity
  • UI/UX Design
  • Development
  • Booking integration
03

Lead Generation

  • Meta & Google Ads
  • Email marketing
  • Influencer outreach
  • Ad funnel strategy
04

AI-First Services

  • AI video content
  • Listing creatives
  • Product photography
  • AI avatar creation
Proven Results

Gigantic Results.
Company Summary.

Proof of what happens when strategy, regional context, and modern ad technology are aligned.

Performance Overview

High scale. Low spend.

Across F&B, creator profiles, and tech brands, our campaigns are engineered for maximum efficiency. We focus on cutting down ad costs (CPM) while driving direct action — whether that's social reach, video views, or direct leads.

Pricing Plans

Flexible Plans for Kumaon Hospitality

Choose the plan that fits your growth goals.

Free Audit during our stay

The 2-hour mountain audit

We stay at your property and conduct a live digital audit over tea. Actionable upgrades, zero obligations.

  • Google Business audit
  • AI photo upgrade
  • OTA gap report
  • AI avatar demo
  • Printed 10-idea sheet
THREE PLANS — CHOOSE BASED ON YOUR SEASON GOAL
Foundation - portfolio rate

Foundation

Regular: ₹20,000/mo
₹9,999/mo

3-month portfolio engagement - then your choice to continue at regular rate or leave

Growth - most picked - recommended

Growth

Regular: ₹55,000/mo
₹24,999/mo

One Oct-March booking at ₹8K ADR covers this month's fee in 3 days

Partner - AI full-stack

Partner

Regular: ₹95,000/mo
₹44,999/mo

Or: ₹15,000/mo + 6% of incremental revenue above your last year's baseline

About Shikhar

We Take Away
3 Tasks from
Your List.

MarketingTechnologyStrategy

Shikhar Media is the marketing arm of OrbitAIM Technologies — a Kumaon-based MarTech consultancy. We also build orbitaim.io (AI SaaS) and orbitaim.com (full-service consultancy).

Stone & timber — Built to last centuries
